title: FrameNet Semantic Role Labeling Structure
description: This diagram illustrates the core components of FrameNet, showing how a target word evokes a semantic frame, which is populated by frame elements (roles) that describe the participants and props in a scenario.
relationships: The Target Word evokes the Semantic Frame
The Semantic Frame defines a set of possible Frame Elements
The Example Sentence is annotated to label instances of the Frame Elements
The Annotations link the text to the abstract frame structure
